name: expressroute
title: Azure Hybrid Connectivity — ExpressRoute
summary: Creates an ExpressRoute circuit, optional Azure private peering (dual /30 BGP sessions), an optional ExpressRoute gateway in one of two modes, and the gateway-to-circuit connection (gated until the provider provisions the circuit). CanNotDelete lock on the circuit by default.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: resource_group_name
module.description: Name of the existing resource group for the ExpressRoute resources.

module.name: location
module.description: Azure region for the ExpressRoute resources.

module.name: service_provider_name
module.description: Connectivity provider name (e.g., 'Equinix', 'Megaport'). Must match an Azure-listed provider.

module.name: peering_location
module.description: Provider peering location (e.g., 'Washington DC'). Distinct from the Azure region.

module.name: bandwidth_in_mbps
module.description: Circuit bandwidth in Mbps (50 to 10000 for provider model).

module.name: sku_tier
module.description: Circuit SKU tier: Standard, Premium (global reach across geopolitical regions), or Local.

module.name: private_peering
module.type: object({ enabled = bool peer_asn = optional(number) primary_peer_address_prefix = optional(string) secondary_peer_address_prefix = optional(string) vlan_id = optional(number) shared_key = optional(string) })
module.description: Azure private peering configuration on the circuit. Both /30 prefixes and the VLAN are agreed with the connectivity provider.

module.name: create_gateway
module.description: Whether to create an ExpressRoute gateway: a virtual network gateway in gateway_subnet_id (attachment_type = 'vnet') or a vWAN ExpressRoute gateway in virtual_hub_id (attachment_type = 'vhub').

module.name: attachment_type
module.description: Where the ER gateway lives: 'vnet' creates a classic virtual network gateway in gateway_subnet_id; 'vhub' creates a vWAN ExpressRoute gateway inside the virtual hub given by virtual_hub_id.

module.name: virtual_hub_id
module.description: ID of an existing vWAN virtual hub (e.g., azure/transit/vwan hub_id output, supplied as a plain value). Required when attachment_type = 'vhub' and create_gateway = true.

module.name: er_gateway_scale_units
module.description: Scale units of the vWAN ExpressRoute gateway (vhub mode). Each unit ~2 Gbps.

module.name: gateway_subnet_id
module.description: ID of the GatewaySubnet for the ER gateway. Required when create_gateway = true.

module.name: gateway_sku
module.description: ExpressRoute gateway SKU (Standard, HighPerformance, UltraPerformance, ErGw1AZ..ErGw3AZ).

module.name: connect_gateway_to_circuit
module.description: Create the connection between the module-managed gateway and circuit. Requires create_gateway = true and the circuit provisioned by the provider.

module.name: enable_management_lock
module.description: Apply a CanNotDelete management lock to the circuit (governance/resource-locks).

outputs.name: service_key
outputs.description: Circuit service key — hand to the connectivity provider to provision the L2 link. SENSITIVE.

outputs.name: service_provider_provisioning_state
outputs.description: Provider provisioning state (NotProvisioned / Provisioning / Provisioned / Deprovisioning).

outputs.name: gateway_id
outputs.description: ID of the ExpressRoute gateway — virtual network gateway (vnet mode) or vWAN ExpressRoute gateway (vhub mode), or null when create_gateway = false.

outputs.name: connection_ids
outputs.description: Map with key 'gateway' to the gateway-circuit connection ID (vnet or vhub mode), empty when not connected.

outputs.name: private_peering_id
outputs.description: ID of the Azure private peering, or null when disabled.
